Index.title: Custom 3D Prints and Unique Products.
Index.description: We manufacture individual 3D prints according to your ideas or deliver immediately available quality products.

tiktok.title: See our Prints in Action
tiktok.subtitle: Follow us on TikTok for daily updates, behind-the-scenes, and new product reveals.

Products.title: Products
Products.description: Discover our curated selection of high-quality 3D printed products.

planter.name: Geometric Planter
planter.description: An elegant, geometric flower pot with a fine layer structure.

organizer.name: Desk Organizer
organizer.description: Modular desk organizer for pens and small parts.

lamp.name: Minimalist Lamp
lamp.description: Atmospheric lamp with a unique light play through 3D printing.

dragon.name: Articulated Dragon
dragon.description: Movable dragon, printed in one piece - perfect as decoration.

headphones.name: Headphone Stand
headphones.description: Stable and stylish stand for your headphones.

container.name: Kitchen Container
container.description: Food-safe storage box with airtight seal.

Request.title: Request custom 3D print
Request.description: Found a model on MakerWorld or have your own idea? Send us the details and we'll create a fair offer for you.

form.name: Name
form.privacy: By submitting you accept our privacy policy.

success.title: Thank you for your request!
success.description: We'll check your 3D print and contact you via WhatsApp with an individual offer.

About.title: Crafting the Future in 3D
About.story: LABDS 3D Print started with a simple passion for creation. Based in the heart of the Black Forest, we combine traditional craftsmanship values with cutting-edge additive manufacturing technology.
About.mission: Our mission is to bring your digital ideas to life with precision, quality, and a commitment to sustainable production.

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.subtitle: Have a question or a custom project in mind? We're here to help.

Footer.tagline: Premium 3D printing and custom products from the Black Forest.
